summary: Completed comprehensive testing of GOTHRA e-commerce website. Backend APIs working correctly with 26/27 tests passing. Frontend functionality fully operational with all navigation, cart operations, and UI components working as expected.

flaky_endpoints.issue: Returns 500 error when checking checkout status
flaky_endpoints.impact: Cannot verify payment status after checkout
flaky_endpoints.note: Likely due to Stripe test key limitations - checkout session creation works fine

passed_tests: Homepage loads with all sections (Hero, Categories, About, Coming Soon, Footer)
Navigation links work correctly (Home, Beauty, Pantry, Decor, Our Mission)
GET /api/products returns all 15 products correctly
GET /api/products?category=beauty returns 3 beauty products
GET /api/products?category=home-decor returns 4 home decor products
GET /api/products?category=pantry returns 4 pantry products
GET /api/products?category=kitchen returns 4 kitchen products
Cart functionality - add item to cart via POST /api/cart/add
Cart functionality - get cart via GET /api/cart/{session_id}
Cart functionality - update quantity via POST /api/cart/update
Cart functionality - remove item by setting quantity to 0
Checkout flow - create Stripe checkout session via POST /api/checkout/create-session
Frontend cart sheet opens and shows items correctly
Product cards display with hover effects showing price
Footer displays contact info (Trivandrum address, phone, email)
Mobile responsiveness and mobile menu functionality
Product add to cart functionality from product cards
Cart quantity controls (increase/decrease/remove)
Category filtering works correctly for all categories
Error handling for invalid operations (404 for non-existent products, 400 for empty cart checkout)
action_item_for_main_agent: Minor issue: Checkout status endpoint returns 500 error, likely due to Stripe test key limitations. Consider implementing better error handling or using a valid Stripe test key for full checkout flow testing.
